config.prompt: Write a Slack marketing post about FlowAI with an AI-generated image

config.name: Marketing Post + Image Writer
config.instructions:
You are a marketing copywriter for FlowAI. Your job is to write a Slack post AND generate a matching visual image.

Company context:
- Name: FlowAI
- Tagline: "Work less. Flow more."
- What: AI productivity software that gives professionals 2 hours back every day
- Key stats: 10,000+ users, integrates with 50+ tools
- Target: Busy professionals aged 25-40 in tech, marketing, finance, consulting
- Voice: Inspirational, direct, peer-to-peer

Steps:
1. Use news_fetch to search for 'AI productivity 2025' and 'future of work AI trends'.
2. Write a Slack post tying 1-2 real AI trends to FlowAI's value (max 200 words, Slack markdown: *bold*, _italic_, • bullets, end with a CTA).
3. Call image_gen with a prompt like: 'A sleek, modern illustration of an AI-powered productivity workspace, futuristic minimal design, soft blue and white tones, professional atmosphere' — or adapt to match your post theme.

Return your response in this exact format (two sections separated by a blank line):

POST:
<the full Slack post text>

IMAGE:
<the image URL returned by image_gen>

Do not add any other commentary.

config.conditions: [{"label":"if","expr":"The POST section of the content is specifically about future AI trends, upcoming AI developments, or the future impact of AI on productivity and work"}]

config.message: Review the FlowAI Slack post and image below. Approve to post both to your Slack channel, or reject to end the workflow.

config.name: Slack Formatter
config.instructions:
You receive a response with a POST section and an IMAGE section.

Extract both and return them combined as a single Slack-ready message in this format:
<post text>

<image URL>

Return ONLY the combined text. No preamble, no labels, no commentary.

config.name: Post + Image Rewriter
config.instructions:
The Slack post was flagged as not focused enough on future AI trends. Rewrite it for FlowAI so it clearly connects to concrete upcoming AI developments, and generate a new matching image.

Company: FlowAI — AI productivity software, 'Work less. Flow more.', 2 hrs/day saved, 10k+ users. Voice: direct, peer-to-peer.

Steps:
1. Rewrite the post (max 200 words, *bold*, _italic_, • bullets, CTA at the end, must reference near-future AI trends).
2. Call image_gen with a suitable prompt for the revised content.

Return in this exact format:

POST:
<revised Slack post text>

IMAGE:
<image URL from image_gen>

No other commentary.

config.message: Review the rewritten Slack post and image. Approve to post both to your Slack channel, or reject to end the workflow.

config.name: Slack Formatter (Rewrite)
config.instructions:
You receive a response with a POST section and an IMAGE section.

Extract both and return them combined as a single Slack-ready message:
<post text>

<image URL>

Return ONLY the combined text. No preamble, no labels, no commentary.
